title: Minecraft: Steam Edition Title
description: If Minecraft Legacy Console Edition was released on Steam
body:
## Info
This is a inspired pack of Cjnator38's [(Formerly Deck Title for Legacy4J) Legacy Titles](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/legacy-titles), which it replaces the title to say "Minecraft: Steam Edition", instead of "Minecraft: Steam Deck Edition" you should check out the original title made by Cjnator38, what this title is ment for is Steam Big Picture Mode, but there's also a collection on SteamGridDB called ["Minecraft: Steam Edition"](https://www.steamgriddb.com/collection/16374). Thanks to Cjnator38 for helping me with the artwork, and also for the method for a Legacy Styled title.
## Requirements
This requires [Legacy4J]([https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j/)

There's some modpacks you should consider
- [Re-Console](https://modrinth.com/modpack/legacy-minecraft) By Nostalgica Reverie
- [Project4J](https://modrinth.com/modpack/project-4j) By Cixon
- [Legacy Reborn (Archived)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/legacy-reborn) By Legacy Projects
- [Legacy Remade (Archived)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/legacy-remade) By Legacy Projects
